daily.today_energy: The cosmos is basically handing you a permission slip to take up space today. There's this electric, slightly chaotic vibe buzzing around you — lean into it instead of fighting it.
daily.love: Someone's been lowkey thinking about you more than they let on. If you're already with someone, ditch the routine tonight and do something genuinely spontaneous together. Real connection lives outside the script.
daily.career: That idea you've been sitting on? Stop waiting for the perfect moment — it literally doesn't exist. Pitch it, send the email, start the doc. The momentum you build today will carry you further than you expect.
daily.health: Your body's been whispering something you've been too busy to hear. Even 10 minutes of stillness — a walk, some stretching, actual fresh air — will reset your whole energy in a way that surprises you.

weekly.overview: This week is all about momentum. You're shedding old habits and stepping into a much more empowered version of yourself. Expect rapid changes and trust that you have the stamina to handle them all.
weekly.love: Romantic boundaries become a major theme. You'll need to figure out where you end and the other person begins. Establish what you truly need and don't settle for lukewarm energy.
weekly.career: A brilliant collaborative opportunity presents itself mid-week. Partnering up with someone whose skills contrast yours will create something magical. Keep your ego in check and listen closely.
weekly.health: Focus on your sleep hygiene. The intense cosmic energy might make your mind race at night. Incorporate a wind-down routine that involves reading or meditation to ground your active fiery spirit.
